title: Flopper - ProjectHDS Edition
description: A hopper for transferring fluids, that continues to be maintained only for Forge 1.12.2 by the ProjectHDS Team.
body:
Original mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flopper


A hopper for transferring fluids, that continues to be maintained only for Forge 1.12.2 by the ProjectHDS Team.


We still accept issues, but won't be actively responding to them.

Depends on https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyclops-core, just like how it was.
